arts.ttl: BREAKING: Bruno Fernandes slammed by Gary Neville as red card sums up Man Utd: 'An absolute disgrace'
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was sent off just before half-time after his side endured a miserable opening period in their clash with Tottenham on Sunday

arts.ttl: Fernandes sent off as Manchester United trail Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a torrid first half against Tottenham in the Premier League. Erik ten Hag’s team were looking for a response after frustrating draws in consecutive campaigns but got off to a nightmare start when Spurs opened the scoring inside three minutes. Micky van de Ven’s scintillating solo run saw the Spurs […] The post Fernandes sent off as Manchester United trail Tottenham first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes Shown Straight Red Card in Man United v Tottenham
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes was shown a straight red card vs Tottenham for 'serious foul play' after a knee-high challenge on James Maddison.

arts.ttl: Premier League Release Statement After Fernandes Red for Man Utd v Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Bruno Fernandes was sent off against Tottenham Hotspur, and the Premier League have explained the referee's decision.

arts.ttl: Why was Bruno Fernandes sent off against Tottenham?
arts.sum: Fernandes was sent off for ‘serious foul play’ to leave United down to 10 men against Tottenham

arts.ttl: 'One of the best runs I've ever seen' - Micky van de Ven's Tottenham assist leaves Gary Neville in awe
arts.sum: The Spurs defender produced a moment of magic for Ange Postecoglou's side at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min ruled out of Tottenham's trip to Man Utd through injury
arts.sum: Son has been able to boast a relatively impressive injury record at Tottenham since his move to the club in 2015 from Bayer Leverkusen and he had not picked up a muscle problem since before Postecoglou's arrival in north London. Tottenham Hotspur are set to face Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday without club captain Son Heung-min.

arts.ttl: Why Harry Maguire isn't in Man Utd squad to face Tottenham
arts.sum: Man Utd starting XI (4-2-3-1): Onana; Mazraoui, De Ligt, Martinez, Dalot; Ugarte, Mainoo; Garnacho, Fernandes, Rashford; Zirkzee Harry Maguire was a notable absentee from the Manchester United matchday squad to face Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag delivers positive Leny Yoro injury update
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has revealed Manchester United defender Leny Yoro's recovery from injury is going well and he is looking forward to reintegrating the French teenager into his first-team squad. Injuries played a major part in United's disappointing 2023/24 Premier League campaign, though Ten Hag has most of first-team squad available for Sunday's fixture against Tottenham Hotspur .

arts.ttl: Spurs centre-back Van de Ven produces extraordinary assist
arts.sum: Micky van de Ven is an astonishing footballer. The Spurs centre-back produced a jaw-dropping assist during his side’s clash with Manchester United as the Dutch defender turned on the accelerator at Old Trafford.
